welcome.name: Jeremy C Kavuncuoglu
welcome.title: Enterprise Application & Cloud Solutions Engineer
welcome.hero_body: I design and deliver secure, scalable Laravel applications and AWS cloud infrastructure for enterprise teams. Specializing in Amazon Connect flow architecture, serverless systems, and DevSecOps automation that power reliable, high-performance customer experiences.
welcome.about_body1: I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer and DevOps Engineer with expertise in building modern web applications and designing robust cloud infrastructure. My focus is on creating efficient, scalable, and secure solutions.
welcome.about_body2: With experience across the entire development lifecycle, from writing clean backend code to implementing CI/CD pipelines and managing cloud infrastructure, I bring a holistic approach to software development.
welcome.about_feature1_desc: Building end-to-end applications with Laravel, Vue.js, and modern frameworks
welcome.about_feature2_desc: Automating infrastructure with AWS, Docker, and Terraform
welcome.about_feature3_desc: Integrating security into every stage of the development process
welcome.skill_frontend_desc: Crafting user-friendly, performant interfaces with a keen eye for design. I focus on component-driven architecture, accessibility, and smooth UX that feels intuitive across all devices.
welcome.skill_backend_desc: Building robust, maintainable server-side applications and APIs. I prioritise clean architecture, separation of concerns, and performance so systems stay reliable as they scale.
welcome.skill_devops_desc: Designing and automating cloud infrastructure on AWS, containerising workloads with Docker, and shipping code confidently through CI/CD pipelines — targeting zero-downtime, repeatable deployments.
welcome.skill_devsecops_desc: Embedding security at every layer: enforcing HIPAA, HITRUST, and SOC 2 requirements, conducting OWASP-guided code reviews, and applying least-privilege IAM policies to minimise attack surface.
welcome.skill_infrastructure_desc: Ensuring reliability, performance, cost efficiency, and security across database and server layers — through query optimisation, intelligent caching strategies, and proper traffic management.
welcome.skill_tools_desc: Working iteratively with Agile and Scrum, maintaining clean version history with Git, and validating behaviour with automated tests — keeping teams aligned and code quality high throughout the delivery cycle.
welcome.project1_desc: Designed and implemented a scalable cloud infrastructure using AWS services with automated CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure-as-code practices.
welcome.project2_desc: Built a modern web application using Laravel and Vue.js with real-time features, authentication, and responsive design.
welcome.project3_desc: Created an automated security scanning pipeline integrating SAST, DAST, and dependency checking into the development workflow.
welcome.contact_body: I'm always interested in new opportunities and collaborations. Whether you have a project in mind or just want to connect, feel free to reach out.
welcome.exp1_desc: Led the upgrade of the core application from Laravel 6 / Vue 2 / Bootstrap to Laravel 12 / Vue 3 / TailwindCSS. Managed the AWS cloud environment (EC2, RDS, ECS, S3, Lambda, CloudWatch, IAM, Redshift, ElastiCache) for security and cost efficiency. Built AI infrastructure for real-time phone system analytics via serverless Lambda and optimised the patient contact system achieving a 40% performance improvement. Led offshore development team defining sprint goals and stakeholder expectations.
welcome.exp2_desc: Architected a multi-site lead management system with a custom real-time bidding algorithm distributing leads by demand, preferences and quality, significantly boosting conversion rates. Built custom WordPress plugins and CLI tools automating metadata generation, URL structure improvements and bulk content updates for large-scale SEO across multiple sites.
welcome.exp3_desc: Developed a PHP-based omni-channel operations management platform synchronising real-time inventory, orders and customer data across Amazon, eBay, Shopify and proprietary storefronts. Designed a modular, scalable backend with optimised database queries and built intuitive dashboards to automate order assignment, shipping labels and stock reconciliation.
welcome.exp4_desc: Built a web-based Laravel product management system with an intuitive UI for efficient inventory tracking and organisation. Introduced Agile methodologies to the development team and established a standardised local Docker development environment, significantly improving team consistency and productivity.
welcome.blog_empty: No posts available yet. Check back soon.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_body: This Privacy Policy explains how kavuncuoglu.com (the Site), operated by J. Kavuncuoglu, collects, uses, and protects information about visitors. We are committed to handling your data responsibly and transparently. By using this Site you agree to the practices described below.
privacy.s2_ga4_p1: We use Google Analytics 4 (GA4) to understand how visitors interact with the Site. GA4 collects the following categories of data automatically:
privacy.s2_ga4_li1: Pages visited, session duration, and navigation paths
privacy.s2_ga4_li2: Referring website or search query that brought you here
privacy.s2_ga4_li3: Device type, operating system, and browser
privacy.s2_ga4_li5: Approximate geographic location (country and city, derived from IP)
privacy.s2_ga4_li6: IP address (anonymised before storage; we do not log full IP addresses)
privacy.s2_ga4_p2: This data is processed by Google LLC and transmitted to Google servers, which may be located in the United States or other countries. Google acts as a data processor on our behalf under Google data processing terms.
privacy.s2_contact_body: When you use the contact form, we collect your name, email address, optional subject, and message. This information is used solely to respond to your enquiry and is not shared with third parties.
privacy.s2_ai_body: The public AI chat feature processes messages you send in order to generate responses. Public chat sessions are stateless — messages are not persistently stored on our servers after your session ends. Authenticated users conversations may be stored to provide conversation history; this data is tied to your account and is not shared with third parties. All AI inference is performed locally on our servers using Ollama — your messages are never sent to external AI providers.
privacy.s2_auth_body: If you create an account, we store your name, email address, and hashed password. We never store passwords in plaintext. Two-factor authentication secrets (if enabled) are stored encrypted.
privacy.s3_intro: This Site uses the following cookies:
privacy.s3_optout: You can opt out of Google Analytics tracking at any time by installing the
privacy.s3_optout_after: , or by disabling cookies in your browser settings.
privacy.s4_li1_text: To understand traffic patterns, identify popular content, and improve the Site's performance and usability.
privacy.s4_li2_text: To read and respond to messages you send through the contact form.
privacy.s4_li3_text: To verify your identity and secure your account.
privacy.s4_li4_text: To generate contextually relevant responses using the knowledge base and local LLM inference.
privacy.s4_li5_text: To meet our obligations under applicable data protection law.
privacy.s5_intro: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data to any third party. Data is shared only in the following limited circumstances:
privacy.s5_li1_text: Aggregated, anonymised analytics data is processed by Google in accordance with their Privacy Policy and their role as a data processor.
privacy.s5_li2_text: Our infrastructure provider processes data solely to operate the servers on which this Site runs.
privacy.s5_li3_text: We may disclose data if required by law, court order, or to protect the safety, rights, or property of ourselves or others.
privacy.s6_li1_text: Retained for 14 months within Google Analytics, after which it is automatically deleted.
privacy.s6_li2_text: Retained for up to 12 months and then deleted, unless an ongoing relationship requires longer retention.
privacy.s6_li3_text: Retained for the lifetime of your account. You may request deletion at any time.
privacy.s7_intro: Depending on your location and applicable law, you may have the right to:
privacy.s7_li1: Access the personal data we hold about you
privacy.s7_li3: Request deletion of your data (right to be forgotten)
privacy.s7_li4: Object to or restrict certain processing
privacy.s7_li5: Withdraw consent at any time (where processing is based on consent)
privacy.s7_li6: Lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority
privacy.s7_footer: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us using the details in Section 10 below. For detailed EU/GDPR rights, see our
privacy.s8_body: We implement industry-standard security measures including HTTPS/TLS encryption, CSRF protection, hashed password storage (bcrypt), and session management. No method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security. We will notify affected users of any data breach as required by applicable law.
privacy.s9_body: This Site may contain links to external websites (e.g. GitHub, LinkedIn, Medium). We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those sites and encourage you to review their own privacy policies.
privacy.s10_body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will revise the Last updated date at the top of this page. Continued use of the Site after any changes constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
privacy.s11_body: For any questions, requests, or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy or your personal data, please reach out via the
privacy.s11_after: or at the details listed there.

You must notify us immediately of any unauthorised use. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or engage in abusive behaviour.
terms.s7_body: The Site may contain links to third-party websites or services. These are provided for convenience only. We have no control over, and accept no responsibility for, the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party sites. Links do not constitute endorsement.
terms.s8_body_pre: The Site and all content, features, and services are provided on an
terms.s8_body_post: basis without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not warrant that the Site will be uninterrupted, error-free, secure, or free of viruses or other harmful components. We do not warrant the accuracy, completeness, or usefulness of any content, including AI-generated responses.
terms.s9_body: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, J. Kavuncuoglu shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or related to your use of or inability to use the Site, including any reliance on information or content obtained through the Site or AI assistant, even if advised of the possibility of such damages.
terms.s10_body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes are effective immediately upon being posted to this page with an updated date. Your continued use of the Site after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms. We recommend reviewing this page periodically.
terms.s11_body: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with applicable law. Any disputes arising under these Terms shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the competent courts in the operator's place of residence, without prejudice to mandatory consumer-protection laws in your jurisdiction.
terms.s12_body_pre: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us via the

gdpr.title: GDPR Notice
gdpr.intro_post: and is specifically addressed to individuals in the
gdpr.intro_bold: European Economic Area (EEA), the United Kingdom, and Switzerland
gdpr.intro_after: . It explains your rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and how we comply.
gdpr.s1_body: As the Data Controller, we determine the purposes and means of processing your personal data. We are responsible for ensuring that processing is lawful, fair, and transparent.
gdpr.s2_intro: Under GDPR Article 6, we rely on the following legal bases:
gdpr.s2_b1_body: We process anonymised analytics data via Google Analytics 4 to understand how the Site is used and to improve it. Our legitimate interest is maintaining a functioning, optimised website. We have assessed that this interest is not overridden by your rights given the anonymisation and minimal privacy impact.
gdpr.s2_b2_body: When you submit the contact form or create an account, we process your name and email address to respond to your enquiry or provide the service you requested.
gdpr.s2_b3_body: We may process data where necessary to comply with a legal obligation, including responding to lawful requests from public authorities.
gdpr.s2_b4_body: Where we rely on consent for non-essential cookies, you may withdraw that consent at any time by adjusting your browser settings or using the Google Analytics opt-out tool.
gdpr.s3_intro_pre: As a data subject under the GDPR, you have the following rights. You may exercise any of these rights by contacting us via the
gdpr.s3_r1_body: You have the right to obtain confirmation of whether we process your personal data, and if so, to receive a copy of that data together with information about how it is used.
gdpr.s3_r2_body: You have the right to have inaccurate personal data corrected, and to have incomplete data completed.
gdpr.s3_r3_title: Right to Erasure — Right to Be Forgotten (Art. 17)
gdpr.s3_r3_body: You may request the deletion of your personal data where it is no longer necessary for the purposes it was collected, you have withdrawn consent, or the processing was unlawful. Certain retention obligations may prevent us from immediately erasing all data.
gdpr.s3_r4_body: You may request that we restrict the processing of your data in certain circumstances — for example, while you contest the accuracy of your data or object to processing.
gdpr.s3_r5_body: Where processing is based on consent or contract and carried out by automated means, you have the right to receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format, and to transmit it to another controller.
gdpr.s3_r6_body: You have the right to object to processing based on legitimate interests or for direct marketing purposes at any time. We will cease processing unless we can demonstrate compelling legitimate grounds that override your interests.
gdpr.s3_r7_body: We do not make solely automated decisions that produce legal or similarly significant effects about you. AI chat responses are informational only and do not constitute binding decisions.
gdpr.s4_intro: Some of the services we use involve the transfer of personal data outside the EEA:
gdpr.s4_li1_text: Data transfers to the US are covered by Google's Data Processing Amendment, which incorporates Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) as approved by the European Commission under GDPR Article 46.
gdpr.s4_li2_text: All AI processing is performed locally on our own servers using Ollama. No data is transmitted to external AI providers or third-country servers for this purpose.
gdpr.s5_p1: Essential cookies (session management, CSRF, language preference) are necessary for the Site to function and do not require consent. Analytics cookies placed by Google Analytics are used on the basis of legitimate interests, with IP anonymisation enabled.
gdpr.s5_p2_pre: You can opt out of Google Analytics at any time using the
gdpr.s5_p2_post: or by configuring your browser to block third-party cookies. Doing so will not affect your use of the Site.
gdpr.s6_intro_pre: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary for the purposes described in our
gdpr.s6_li1: Google Analytics data: up to 14 months
gdpr.s6_li2: Contact form enquiries: up to 12 months
gdpr.s6_li3: Account data: retained while the account is active; deleted within 30 days of an erasure request
gdpr.s7_body_pre: If you believe your data protection rights have been violated, you have the right to lodge a complaint with your national data protection supervisory authority. For a list of EEA supervisory authorities, see the
gdpr.s7_body_mid: website. UK residents may contact the
gdpr.s7_encourage: We encourage you to contact us first so we can address your concern directly before escalating to a supervisory authority.
gdpr.s8_body_pre: To exercise any of your rights or ask questions about this GDPR Notice, please contact us via the
gdpr.s8_body_after: and will not charge a fee for reasonable requests.

about.page_title: About This Site — Jeremy C Kavuncuoglu
about.title: About This Site
about.intro: This personal portfolio is a living proof-of-concept — every feature is production-grade, real, and running the same stack I use professionally. Below is an honest breakdown of the technologies powering it.
about.laravel_desc: The backbone of the application. Handles routing, middleware, Eloquent ORM, queued jobs, and all server-side logic. Laravel 12 brings the latest conventions in clean, expressive PHP.
about.inertia_desc: Bridges Laravel and Vue without a dedicated REST API layer. Pages are server-rendered responses that hydrate Vue components — giving the feel of an SPA with the simplicity of traditional MVC.
about.fortify_desc: Full authentication stack: registration, login, two-factor authentication (TOTP), email verification, and session-based API tokens via Sanctum.
about.spatie_desc: Handles all file association, storage, and retrieval for uploaded knowledge-base documents — including PDF, Word, and image assets.
about.neuron_desc: A PHP-native AI orchestration framework that powers the conversational assistant. Manages prompt construction, context windowing, tool use, and streaming responses — all from within Laravel.
about.ollama_desc: Runs large language models entirely on-premise — no cloud API, no data leaving the server. Used for both chat completions and generating vector embeddings for the RAG knowledge base.
about.rag_desc: The AI assistant is grounded in a private knowledge base of uploaded documents (PDF, Word, images, plain text). Documents are chunked, embedded into high-dimensional vectors via Ollama, and stored in MySQL. At query time, the most semantically relevant chunks are retrieved and injected into the prompt context — giving the model accurate, up-to-date, private knowledge without hallucination.
about.parsers_desc: Ingests knowledge-base uploads in any format: smalot/pdfparser for PDF, phpoffice/phpword for .docx, and Tesseract OCR for scanned images.
about.vue_desc: All UI is built with Vue 3's Composition API and script setup. TypeScript-first throughout, with strict typing enforced by vue-tsc.
about.tailwind_desc: The latest major version of Tailwind — now CSS-native with a Vite plugin, no PostCSS config required. Every layout, colour, and responsive breakpoint is expressed in utility classes.
about.shadcn_desc: Accessible, unstyled primitives from reka-ui (the Vue port of Radix UI), composed into styled components using shadcn conventions. Buttons, dialogs, inputs, and tooltips are all accessibility-compliant.
about.vite_desc: Instant HMR in development and highly optimised code-split bundles in production. The Laravel Vite plugin handles asset manifest injection and server-side asset URL resolution automatically.
about.vueuse_desc: A comprehensive library of composable Vue utilities — used for reactive media queries, clipboard access, event listeners, and browser API abstractions throughout the UI.
about.i18n_desc: Full internationalisation in English, German, Turkish, and Spanish. Locale detection from the browser's Accept-Language header with cookie persistence and a locale switcher in the nav.
about.circuit_desc: The PCB-style background is a fully custom, zero-dependency SVG animation engine written in ~300 lines of TypeScript. A seeded PRNG generates deterministic trace layouts with rounded bezier corners, per-trace opacity variation, and IC chip elements. Electricity streaks use burst-mode CSS animation — each lit trace fires 2–4 data-packet flashes that walk the path from start to end, driven by a coordinated timer system with stale-timeout cancellation.
about.darkmode_desc: System-preference-aware dark mode via Tailwind's dark: variant, with a manual toggle persisted to localStorage. Colours, glows, and SVG filters all adapt seamlessly.
about.lucide_desc: Consistent, accessible SVG icon set — tree-shaken per-icon to minimise bundle size. Every interactive element has an accompanying accessible label.
about.docker_desc: The entire environment — PHP-FPM, MySQL, Redis, Mailpit, and Ollama — runs in Docker via Laravel Sail. One command spins up a fully reproducible, production-like dev environment.
about.mysql_desc: Stores document chunks alongside their Ollama-generated vector embeddings as JSON arrays. Cosine similarity is computed at query time to surface the most relevant knowledge-base excerpts.
about.telescope_desc: Real-time introspection of requests, queries, jobs, and exceptions during development. Indispensable for debugging AI streaming responses and background document-processing pipelines.
about.wayfinder_desc: Auto-generates type-safe TypeScript route helper functions from Laravel's route definitions. Eliminates hardcoded URL strings from the frontend and catches route regressions at compile time.
about.closing_pre: Every dependency listed here is running in production on this site right now — not a sample project, not a tutorial clone. If you have questions about any implementation detail, or want to work together,
